title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences

emailNotifications.title: Email Notifications
emailNotifications.description: Receive email updates about your sessions

sessionReminders.title: Session Reminders
sessionReminders.description: Get reminders for scheduled practice sessions

aiAudio.title: AI & Audio Settings
aiAudio.subtitle: Default settings for AI responses and audio detection

aiResponseBehavior.title: AI Response Behavior
aiResponseBehavior.description: Configure how the AI responds during periods of silence
aiResponseBehavior.enableSilencePromptHelp: The AI will automatically prompt the user after a period of silence
aiResponseBehavior.silenceTimeoutHelp: How long to wait before the AI prompts the user (in seconds)
aiResponseBehavior.showSilenceTimerHelp: Display the silence countdown timer to the user

audioDetectionSettings.title: Audio Detection Settings
audioDetectionSettings.silenceThresholdHelp: Volume threshold for silence detection (0.01-0.2, default: 0.12)
audioDetectionSettings.minSilenceDurationHelp: Minimum silence duration before triggering speech_end (100-2000ms, default: 500ms)

comingSoon: Profile editing and additional settings will be available soon. Currently showing read-only information.
